mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, cover_image_url, teacher_id, category_id, status, enrollment_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, is_private FROM courses WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT count(1) FROM courses WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses (id, title, description, cover_image_url, teacher_id, category_id, status, enrollment_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, is_private) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{coverImageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollmentCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, #{isPrivate,jdbcType=TINYINT})

INSERT INTO courses
id, title, description, cover_image_url, teacher_id, category_id, status, enrollment_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, is_private,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{coverImageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollmentCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, #{isPrivate,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.update:
UPDATE courses
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment_count = #{enrollmentCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_private = #{isPrivate,jdbcType=TINYINT},
updated_at = NOW(),
WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE courses SET title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment_count = #{enrollmentCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updated_at = NOW(), is_private = #{isPrivate,jdbcType=TINYINT} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE courses SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, title FROM courses
id IN
#{id}
AND is_deleted = 0
1 = 0
